'''Etab Lapha''' worked as a [[Quality Assurance Investigator]] for the [[Republic Sienar Systems/Legends|Republic Sienar Systems]] corporation, during the [[Standard year/Legends|years]] leading up to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].
